<think> Glaube Feitosa is a Brazilian kickboxer. The K-1 World Grand Prix is a major kickboxing tournament. I would look up their fight records to determine how many times they fought against each other in full bouts. </think>

<answer> The number of times Glaube Feitosa fought against the Dutch kickboxer who won the K-1 World Grand Prix cannot be determined without knowing the name of the Dutch winner.
